---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected (e.g. marketer configuring CAPI, data engineer running the job)?

## Proposed solution

How would you like it to work? Mock-ups, API shapes, or UX flows welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit.

## Additional context

Links to relevant Meta CAPI docs, Databricks docs, or related issues.
